page_metadata.biotools__summary: FoldGO is a web tool for fold-change-specific functional enrichment analysis of transcriptome. FoldGO identifies gene ontology (GO) terms specifically enriched in sets of genes with a similar fold-changes in response to a stimulus.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: FoldGO is a web tool for fold-change-specific functional enrichment analysis of transcriptome. FoldGO identifies gene ontology (GO) terms specifically enriched in sets of genes with a similar fold-changes in response to a stimulus.
